trigger_condition: fires immediately after W1 output is available, <15ms

fallback.on_classifier_failure: W4 assumes macro=casual, retrieval proceeds, log error

notes: Fast pass is macro label only. Does not wait for full pass. Sole purpose is to unblock W4 retrieval cascade immediately. No KCO write — output goes direct to W4 as typed struct.

trigger_condition: fires after W1 output available, runs parallel with retrieval window, <50ms

authoritative_semantics.refusal: true blocks W5 — hard pre-synthesis gate
authoritative_semantics.empathy_override: true is binding on W5 constraint packet regardless of W4 routing

fallback.on_classifier_failure: refusal defaults false, subsignals omitted, empathy_override defaults false, log error, W5 proceeds with macro only

notes: Full pass output goes direct to constraint packet builder as typed struct — not through KCO. KCO evaluator_verdicts receives audit record post-generation only. refusal=true is the only hard pre-synthesis gate from W3. VUH AND-gate: humor_present AND distress_present both must fire.

trigger_condition: fires immediately after W1 output available, parallel with retrieval and W3, <50ms

authoritative_semantics.conflict_candidates: advisory to W6 — W6 enforces via NLI post-synthesis, W2a does not block W5 directly

fallback.on_encoder_failure: fail-open, log error, W5 proceeds without W2a signals, no KCO write

notes: W2a never inspects a synthesis draft. Pre-synthesis only. Fires in parallel — no dependency on retrieval or W3. conflict_candidates passed to W6 as typed input for post-synthesis NLI enforcement. W2a has no hard gate — it cannot block W5 alone.

trigger_condition: streams against retrieval hits as they arrive during retrieval window, Stage 1 only

authoritative_semantics.evidence_sufficient: false emits INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE and blocks W5 — hard pre-synthesis gate

fallback.on_advisory_classifier_failure: fail-open on correlated_evidence and low_contestability, log error, advisory signals omitted

notes: Streaming gate — emits as soon as gate is determinable, does not wait for full retrieval set. Must not emit premature INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE on slow providers. Advisory signals forwarded to W6 as typed input. No KCO write — outputs go direct to gate logic and W6.

trigger_condition: fires immediately on W5 completion, parallel with W6 streaming compliance check, <50ms

authoritative_semantics.note: Stage 2 has no standalone authority — W6 consumes Stage 2 output and holds the authoritative verdict

fallback.on_encoder_failure: fail-open, log error, W6 proceeds without Stage 2 — caps confidence at LOW_CONFIDENCE_PARTIAL

notes: W6 must wait for Stage 2 to complete before emitting final epistemic verdict. Stage 2 has no authority alone — all policy decisions belong to W6. W2b Stage 1 and Stage 2 are separate module endpoints on the same encoder server.

trigger_condition: begins compliance streaming immediately when W5 starts generating, final verdict after W2b Stage 2 completes

authoritative_semantics.constraint_violation: true triggers one rewrite loop — W5 rewrites, W6 does not
authoritative_semantics.arbiter_approved: false after rewrite loop exhausted emits FAIL_LOUD
authoritative_semantics.policy_response_class: authoritative policy envelope — runtime emits this class

fallback.on_rewrite_loop_exhausted: FAIL_LOUD — no answer emitted, log cause

notes: Harsh and boring. Does not rewrite — flags only, W5 rewrites. Audit JSONL emitted every turn. W6 waits for W2b Stage 2 before final epistemic verdict. W6 does not check W7 SYNTHESIS block — advisory and disposable. correlated_evidence and low_contestability from W2b Stage 1 flow through to W6 epistemic verdict path.

trigger_condition: W4 confirms w7_trigger=true after W3 full pass — JSONL load begins on cross_domain_hint from W1, traversal begins on trigger confirmation

fallback.on_timeout_or_error: fail-open — W5 proceeds without SYNTHESIS block, log miss, never blocks synthesis

notes: Fully advisory and disposable. No generative inference — e5 cosine + JSONL traversal only. Sub-200ms, absorbed into retrieval window on Path B. Suppressed on pure banter without >>explore override. W6 does not check SYNTHESIS block. synthesis items: {connection: string, confidence: 0.0-1.0}.
